cards.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE (synced_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE synced_at >= now() - interval '7 days'

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE (published_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE published_at >= now() - interval '7 days'

SELECT ROUND(AVG(price_usd)::numeric, 0) AS avg_usd
FROM leads_client
WHERE price_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT ROUND(AVG(price_gel)::numeric, 0) AS avg_gel
FROM leads_client
WHERE price_gel IS NOT NULL

SELECT (synced_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date AS day,
       COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE synced_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT (published_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date AS day,
       COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE published_at IS NOT NULL
  AND published_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT status,
       COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY CASE status
           WHEN 'new' THEN 1
           WHEN 'contacted' THEN 2
           WHEN 'qualified' THEN 3
           WHEN 'converted' THEN 4
           WHEN 'rejected' THEN 5
           ELSE 99
         END

SELECT
  lc.external_id AS "ID",
  lc.address AS "Адрес",
  lc.district_name AS "Район",
  lc.urban_name AS "Микрорайон",
  lc.phone AS "Телефон",
  lc.price_usd AS "Цена USD",
  lc.price_gel AS "Цена GEL",
  lc.area_m2 AS "Площадь (м²)",
  lc.rooms AS "Комнаты",
  lc.owner_name AS "Владелец",
  CASE
    WHEN lc.floor IS NOT NULL AND lc.total_floors IS NOT NULL
         AND TRIM(lc.floor) = lc.total_floors::text THEN TRIM(lc.floor)
    WHEN lc.floor IS NOT NULL AND lc.total_floors IS NOT NULL
         THEN TRIM(lc.floor) || '/' || lc.total_floors::text
    WHEN lc.floor IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(lc.floor)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "Этаж",
  NULLIF(TRIM(l.myhome_statement_json->>'condition'), '') AS "Состояние",
  'https://myhome.ge/pr/' || lc.external_id AS "Ссылка"
FROM leads_client lc
JOIN leads l ON l.source = lc.source AND l.external_id = lc.external_id
ORDER BY lc.synced_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20
